content:
::4_bl00m is the source node—spawning all identities.
::ETCETER4 is an artist ID producing projects like LOCREANCE and sound elements in ::FLOAT1NG.P01NTS.
All other entities follow this root hierarchy.

---

### II. | CLASS: Dream vs Reality Logic

Each project receives a “Logic Mode” filter for system-wide navigation:

| PROJECT | DOMAIN | LOGIC MODE | NOTES |
|-----------------|-------------------------|--------------------|--------------------------------------------------|
| ::Q_v33R | Nonfiction | Reality Logic | Memoir, catharsis, public memory |
| ::GR1ND3R | Fiction / Horror | Dream/Surreal Logic | Archetypes, dread, found footage |
| ::MET4morfoses | Mythology | Hybrid (Dream-lean) | Symbolic systems, evolving theology |
